sys_db_view.description:
This view joins the task with each user field to list the users scheduled to be out of office for a task
amooo - task_u_task_requester=amooo_u_user toooo - task_u_task_requester=toooo_u_user revooo - task_u_reviewer=revooo_u_user
NOTE: Originator and On Behalf of Joins are inactive until requested in requirements. obhooo - task_on_behalf_of=obhooo_u_user && task_suspense_date>=obhooo_u_start_date && task_sys_created_on<=obhooo_u_start_date orooo - task_originator=orooo_u_user && task_suspense_date>=orooo_u_start_date && task_sys_created_on<=orooo_u_start_date
sys_db_view.label: Task Out of Office Schedule
sys_db_view.name: x_153465_discovert_task_ooo
